patch.value: Corpus truncation (8000 default, 3200 Ollama) is hardcoded in corpus.ts; large-body items truncate with no override and cost-sensitive users cannot lower it. buildSemanticCorpusInput already accepts maxCharacters.
New positive-integer setting wired through corpus build call sites; validator falls back to defaults on unset/invalid; reindex+background refresh honor it; PRD+README+tests.

Corpus truncation (8000 default, 3200 Ollama) is hardcoded in corpus.ts; large-body items truncate with no override and cost-sensitive users cannot lower it. buildSemanticCorpusInput already accepts maxCharacters.
